shakshi: Keshi encountered — the Gift Horse, Djinn, Demon of Destruction of Growth. His gifts corrupt through silence, not deception.
Keshi offered a unilateral 30-point skill boost across all skills in exchange for an unnamed life — the player does not choose whom
The player accepted Keshi's deal — consenting to a death they did not understand
30 points added across all skills — Keshi's gift landed exactly as offered
A mysterious plague now sweeps Azonithia — the player does not know they caused it, the connection between deal and death is invisible
Hue is most likely to die — slow and brutal. The player almost certainly does not connect this to the deal.
The player accepted without understanding the cost — Keshi did not explain, the gift arrived and so did the plague
The player refused Keshi's deal — protected by instinct or principle rather than knowledge
Refusal prevented the plague entirely — Azonithia is protected
Keshi did not explain himself — the player carries the encounter without a frame for what happened
The responsibility Lucifer placed on the player was not escaped — with or without the deal, it remains
